events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need parse task. Scenario: commercial construction, drywall & finishing, observed field condition: no gap at floor. Work rough-complete. Condition categories may apply: installed-defective. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Reference GA-216 and IRC. We need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. No gap at floor likely means drywall panels installed tight to floor without required 1/2 inch clearance above floor per GA-216 and IRC? Need recall. In drywall installation, panels should not touch floor; maintain 1/2" gap at floor to prevent moisture wicking and allow expansion. IRC R702.3.5? Maybe interior gypsum board must be separated from floor by 1/2" in basements? GA-216 requires 1/2" minimum clearance between gypsum panel and floor, except gypsum base for veneer plaster maybe. Commercial project: GA-216 Section? Also IBC requires 1/2" clearance. So "no gap at floor" is non-compliant/defective. Need decision fail, risk maybe medium? Could cause moisture damage, wicking, mold, edge damage. Condition installed-defective and non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 70? Work stage rough-complete. Findings: drywall installed tight to floor without required clearance. Actions: trim bottom edge to create 1/2" gap, protect edges, inspect for moisture damage. References: GA-216, IRC. Need format exactly JSON. Include all fields. sound_source etc set null/empty/0 per instructions. Let's construct.

Need ensure JSON valid and no extra formatting.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective",
    "non-compliant"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Gypsum wallboard panels are installed tight to the floor with no clearance gap",
    "Bottom edges of drywall are in direct contact with the concrete/ finished floor substrate"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify required clearance dimension per project specifications and applicable code",
    "Trim bottom edge of drywall to provide the required 1/2 inch minimum gap above floor",
    "Inspect bottom edges and floor contact area for moisture intrusion or damage before repair",
    "Seal or protect cut edges as required by specification"
  ],
  "rationale": "Drywall must be held off the floor to prevent moisture wicking, edge damage, and fungal growth. A panel installed with no gap at the floor violates GA-216 and IRC installation requirements, making the installation defective and non-compliant.",
  "references": [
    "GA-216 Application and Finishing of Gypsum Panel Products",
    "IRC (International Residential Code) gypsum board installation requirements"
  ]
}
